features: Double sided design: the wooden nail cleaning brush features double sided design, soft bristles on one side for hands and top of nails, and smaller, stiffer angled bristles on other side for cleaning under nails, keeping your nails clean and nice

Size: the nail brush is approx. 9.6 x 3.6 cm/ 3.78 x 1.42 inches (LW), the one side bristle length is approx. 1.5 cm/ 0.60 inches, the other side bristle length is approx. 1.2 cm/ 0.47 inches, proper size to use, easy to keep your nails and hands clean and well-groomed

Durable material: the double sided nail brush is made of wooden handle, with non slip design, durable and practical, lightweight and portable, convenient to carry to camping, picnic, travel and so on, which can accompany you for a long time

Wide range of applications: the wooden nail brushes can be applied in the kitchen, bathroom, garden shed sink, suitable for removing dirt from hand, fingertip and foot, nice pedicure and manicure brushes for both men and women, in addition, can also be applied for brushing your lovely pet's paws

Package contents: you will receive 6 pieces of wooden nail brushes in total, nicely shaped, comfortable size, easy to hold and use, adequate quantity for your using and replacement in daily life, you can also share them with others
